heading: Repealed. –(ee), ,Pub. L. 98–213, § 16(w)97 Stat. 1463Dec. 8, 1983
label: 1471 to 1479 Repealed. –(ee), ,Pub. L. 98–213, § 16(w)97 Stat. 1463Dec. 8, 1983
notes: Section 1471, , , prohibited legislatures of Territories of the United States from passing local or special laws in certain enumerated cases.act July 30, 1886, ch. 818, § 124 Stat. 170

Section 1472, acts , ; , , related to limitations on indebtedness of political or municipal corporations and county or other subdivisions in any Territory.July 30, 1886, ch. 818, § 424 Stat. 171Aug. 22, 1911, ch. 4337 Stat. 33
Section 1473, , , limited authority of Territorial legislature to contract any debt by or on behalf of such Territory to certain enumerated cases.act July 30, 1886, ch. 818, § 324 Stat. 171
Section 1474, , , related to creation by Territorial legislatures of new counties and location of county seats.act July 19, 1888, ch. 679, § 225 Stat. 336

Section 1475, , , prohibited Territorial legislature or political subdivision thereof from subscribing to capital stock of, or loaning its credit to, any incorporated company or association.act July 30, 1886, ch. 818, § 224 Stat. 171
Section 1476, , , authorized issuance of bonds by chartered municipal corporations for sanitary and health purposes, free of certain debt limitations.act Mar. 4, 1898, ch. 3530 Stat. 252
Section 1477, , , authorized issuance of bonds by chartered municipal corporations for erection of city buildings, free of certain debt limitations.act June 6, 1900, ch. 82031 Stat. 683

Section 1478, , , prohibited construction of any provision to abridge power of Congress from annulling any law of a Territorial legislature, or modifying any existing law of Congress requiring that laws of any Territory be submitted to Congress.act July 30, 1886, ch. 818, § 624 Stat. 171

Section 1479, , , declared null and void any acts passed by any Territorial legislature after , in conflict with specific sections of this title.act July 30, 1886, ch. 818, § 724 Stat. 171July 30, 1886
